action_set_definitions.name: fetch_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including location, metadata, and progress.

action_set_definitions.name: navigate_to
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the agent to a specific area or room within the building.

location_name.description: The target room or area name.

action_set_definitions.name: conduct_brake_test
action_set_definitions.description: Evaluates the integrity of the mechanical braking system using a specific load.

test_load_lbs.description: The weight load applied for the test in pounds.

action_set_definitions.name: conduct_governor_test
action_set_definitions.description: Tests the overspeed governor engagement of Type B safeties at contract speed.

contract_speed_fpm.description: The rated contract speed in feet per minute.

action_set_definitions.name: conduct_buffer_test
action_set_definitions.description: Tests hydraulic oil buffer performance to verify return timings and impact absorption.

test_load_lbs.description: The weight load applied for the test in pounds.

action_set_definitions.name: update_compliance_log
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the official building compliance log with a new inspection status.

building_id.description: The ID of the building to be updated.

state_description.building_metadata: General information about the building being inspected.
state_description.current_location: The current room or area where the inspector is located.
state_description.inspection_progress: A map of inspection categories to their current completion status.
state_description.active_violations: A list of identified non-compliant items found during the current session.
state_description.environmental_conditions: Physical conditions of the site that might affect inspection (e.g., power status, lighting).
state_description.access_log: List of areas the inspector has already cleared or entered.
